creator: mac@culver.net
text:
This is the entire output, independent of the argument given to mtr:


                           Matt's traceroute  [v0.28]

Keys:  R - Restart statistics    Q - Quit
                                            Packets            Pings
Hostname                                 %Loss  Rcv Snt  Best  Avg  Worst

How-To-Repeat: just run /usr/local/sbin/mtr

Use any argument you like, such as "freebsd.org" or whatever, it
doesn't make any difference.
